content: *꾸러미, 일반* {color="gray"} --- **무게:** 29 lbs **가치:** 33 GP --- 사제의 꾸러미는 다음 아이템을 포함합니다: [배낭](/212f7f5a1e808113a699d64caf25e4ab?pvs=25), [담요](/212f7f5a1e8081cfa4dde62c30824051?pvs=25), [성수](/212f7f5a1e80815d8eebdea04f6eacc4?pvs=25), [램프](/212f7f5a1e808167aee5c154cbb6561f?pvs=25), 7일치 [휴대식량](/212f7f5a1e808112b5ecfacc3de52b5a?pvs=25), [로브](/212f7f5a1e80817abb3cd7b02f809066?pvs=25), [부싯깃통](/212f7f5a1e80813da4afc2be9884e5a6?pvs=25).
